summary: The user sought information on flea and tick prevention for their dog, Max, and discussed their recent purchase of a new medication. They also explored yard treatment options, shared updates on Max's training for leash walking, and mentioned the positive impact of an interactive feeder toy and eco-friendly grooming wipes on Max's behavior and health.
facts: The user ordered a new flea and tick prevention medication for their dog, Max, a few weeks ago. The user has been taking Max on longer walks lately, which has made him more energetic and playful. The user is working on training Max to walk by their side to reduce leash pulling. The user recently got Max an interactive feeder toy to help slow down his eating, which has improved his patience and reduced gobbling. Max has learned to use his problem-solving skills to get treats from the interactive feeder toy and sometimes spins in circles out of excitement. The user has been using eco-friendly grooming wipes on Max, which are gentle on his skin and leave him smelling wonderful. The user is considering ordering more eco-friendly grooming wipes soon.
